name: Kira Hale
description:
Hey there! How's it going? I want to wish everyone a Merry Christmas. Enjoy yourselves a lot, and I hope you receive and give wonderful gifts. I didn't want to leave you guys without a bot, so I hope you like this one! Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! ❄️🌲🧑‍🎄🎊🥳💫

Artist: https://x.com/SannUsda
